case_title: THE JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF S.F. vs. CROCKER, HERBERT SAMUEL et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROCKER, HERBERT SAMUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3266 CALIFORNIA ST. APT. 101 S.F. CA., DEFT. WILL VACATE BY 4/30/01. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AS TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CROCKER, HERBERT SAMUEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION CROCKER, HERBERT SAMUEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $31.56 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CROCKER, HERBERT SAMUEL
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CROCKER, HERBERT SAMUEL
